iree_add_all_subdirs()

loom_cc_binary(
  NAME
    source_info
  SRCS
    "source_info.c"
  DEPS
    loom::binding::c::loomc
)

loom_cc_binary(
  NAME
    compile_text
  SRCS
    "compile_text.c"
  DEPS
    loom::binding::c::loomc
)

loom_cc_binary(
  NAME
    link_modules
  SRCS
    "link_modules.c"
  DEPS
    loom::binding::c::loomc
)

if(LOOM_TARGET_ARCH_SPIRV AND LOOM_EMIT_SPIRV)
loom_cc_binary(
  NAME
    emit_spirv_offline
  SRCS
    "emit_spirv_offline.c"
  DEPS
    loom::binding::c::loomc
    loom::binding::c::target::spirv
)
endif()

if(LOOM_TARGET_ARCH_AMDGPU AND LOOM_EMIT_AMDGPU)

  NAME
    emit_amdgpu_offline
  SRCS
    "emit_amdgpu_offline.c"
  DEPS
    loom::binding::c::loomc
    loom::binding::c::target::amdgpu
)
endif()

if(LOOM_TARGET_ARCH_AMDGPU AND LOOM_EMIT_AMDGPU)
loom_cc_binary(
  NAME
    emit_amdgpu_hsa
  SRCS
    "emit_amdgpu_hsa.c"
  DEPS
    ${CMAKE_DL_LIBS}
    iree::third_party::hsa_runtime_headers
    loom::binding::c::loomc
    loom::binding::c::target::amdgpu
)
endif()

if(LOOM_TARGET_ARCH_SPIRV AND LOOM_EMIT_SPIRV)

    emit_spirv_vulkaninfo

    "emit_spirv_vulkaninfo.c"
  DEPS

    loom::binding::c::target::spirv
    loom::binding::c::target::spirv::vulkaninfo
)
endif()

if(LOOM_TARGET_ARCH_SPIRV AND LOOM_EMIT_SPIRV AND LOOM_EXECUTE_IREE_HAL AND IREE_HAL_DRIVER_VULKAN)

  NAME
    emit_spirv_vulkan
  SRCS
    "emit_spirv_vulkan.c"
  DEPS
    ${CMAKE_DL_LIBS}
    loom::binding::c::loomc
    loom::binding::c::target::spirv
    loom::binding::c::target::spirv::vulkan
)
endif()

if(LOOM_TARGET_ARCH_SPIRV AND LOOM_EMIT_SPIRV)
loom_cc_binary(
  NAME
    emit_spirv_iree_hal
  SRCS
    "emit_spirv_iree_hal.c"
  DEPS
    iree::async::util::proactor_pool
    iree::base
    iree::base::threading
    iree::hal
    iree::hal::drivers
    loom::binding::c::loomc
    loom::binding::c::target::iree_hal
    loom::binding::c::target::spirv
    loom::binding::c::target::spirv::iree_hal
)
endif()

if(LOOM_TARGET_ARCH_AMDGPU AND LOOM_EMIT_AMDGPU)

    emit_amdgpu_offline_test

  DEPS
    loom::binding::c::loomc
    loom::binding::c::target::amdgpu

endif()

if(LOOM_TARGET_ARCH_AMDGPU AND LOOM_EMIT_AMDGPU)
loom_cc_test(
  NAME
    emit_amdgpu_hsa_test
  SRCS
    "emit_amdgpu_hsa.c"
  DEPS
    ${CMAKE_DL_LIBS}
    iree::third_party::hsa_runtime_headers
    loom::binding::c::loomc
    loom::binding::c::target::amdgpu
  LABELS
    "driver=amdgpu"
    "iree-run-requirement=runtime.resource.amd_gpu"
    "nodocker"
    "requires-gpu-amd"
    "runtime-resource=amd-gpu"
  RESOURCE_GROUP
    loom-amdgpu-tests
)
endif()

if(LOOM_TARGET_ARCH_SPIRV AND LOOM_EMIT_SPIRV AND LOOM_EXECUTE_IREE_HAL AND IREE_HAL_DRIVER_VULKAN)
loom_cc_test(
  NAME
    emit_spirv_vulkan_test
  SRCS
    "emit_spirv_vulkan.c"
  DEPS
    ${CMAKE_DL_LIBS}
    loom::binding::c::loomc
    loom::binding::c::target::spirv
    loom::binding::c::target::spirv::vulkan
  LABELS
    "driver=vulkan"
    "iree-run-requirement=runtime.resource.vulkan_device"
    "runtime-resource=vulkan-device"
  RESOURCE_GROUP
    loom-vulkan-tests
  SANITIZER_SUPPRESSIONS
    lsan
    vulkan
)
endif()

if(LOOM_TARGET_ARCH_SPIRV AND LOOM_EMIT_SPIRV AND LOOM_EXECUTE_IREE_HAL AND IREE_HAL_DRIVER_VULKAN)

  NAME
    emit_spirv_iree_hal_test
  SRCS
